creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Created attachment 232163
0001-net-p2p-bazarr-devel-Removed.-Use-net-p2p-bazarr-ins.patch

Keeping the bazarr-devel port up-to-date is not working out the way as I thought.
Most of the time there are several upstream updates in the time it takes for a patch ot be picked up, the packages to be build etc.
So I decided to drop this port, and only have net-p2p/bazarr, which tracks stable releases of the project, in tree.
